parameters.name: q
parameters.value: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, Name, Company, Phone, Email, City, State, PostalCode, Website, OwnerId, Owner.Name, LeadSource, Status, CreatedDate FROM Lead WHERE CreatedDate >= LAST_N_MINUTES:6 AND Prophet_Notified__c = false AND Company != null AND (Phone != null OR Email != null) ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC LIMIT 10

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, Name, Phone, Email, AccountId, Account.Name, Account.Status__c, Account.TCI_Status__c, Account.OwnerId, Account.Owner.Name FROM Contact WHERE LastModifiedDate >= LAST_N_MINUTES:6 AND Prophet_Notified__c = false AND AccountId != null AND Account.Status__c NOT IN ('Active', 'Renewal', 'Reinstated', 'Paused', 'Delinquent', 'Pending') AND (Account.TCI_Status__c = null OR Account.TCI_Status__c != 'Member') ORDER BY LastModifiedDate DESC LIMIT 10
